entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A food crop grown in semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where sorghum is an important food crop.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: AFRICAN STEM BORER
entities.description: An economically important insect pest of sorghum (Busseola fusca).

entities.name: SPOTTED STEM BORER
entities.description: An economically important insect pest of sorghum (Chilo partellus).

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand attack by stem borers.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using molecular markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of lines derived from crossing two parents, used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: LEAF FEEDING
entities.description: Damage caused by insects feeding on leaves.

entities.name: DEADHEART
entities.description: The death of the growing point of a plant, often caused by stem borers.

entities.name: EXIT HOLES
entities.description: Holes made by larvae when exiting the stem.

entities.name: STEM TUNNELS
entities.description: Tunnels created by larvae inside the stem.

entities.name: LEAF TOUGHNESS
entities.description: The physical resistance of the leaf to tearing or penetration.

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOUR
entities.description: The health and growth rate of young plants.

entities.name: BLOOM WAXINESS
entities.description: The presence of a waxy coating on the bloom.

entities.name: LEAF GLOSSINESS
entities.description: The reflective quality of the leaf surface.

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: The number of hair-like structures on the plant surface.

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Analysis of variance used for statistical testing of traits.

entities.name: GENSTAT
entities.description: Statistical software used for ANOVA.

entities.name: PEARSON'S CORRELATION
entities.description: A statistical measure of the linear correlation between two variables.

entities.name: JOINMAP 4
entities.description: Software used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: PLABQTL
entities.description: Software used for QTL analysis.

entities.name: LOD SCORE
entities.description: Logarithm of the odds ratio used to determine linkage.

entities.name: CS132-2
entities.description: A specific marker colocalised for leaf toughness and stem tunneling traits.
